releases.description:
See the **asset downloads** section for Linux, MacOS, Windows and Android. **iOS (iPhone and iPad):** [Let me know](https://gambhiro.github.io/) if you have a developer account and are interested in helping to build `.ipa` files for Simsapa.

New features and fixes since v0.1.10:

- Fulltext Search
  - Pāli declension matching (bodhiṁ → bodhiyā) and accent folding (vinnana → viññāṇa)
- On mobile, now **single tap** on a Pāli word for dictionary lookup, or long press to create a selection (the method in previous versions)
- Built-in dictionary includes commentary bold definitions via DPD
- Dictionary import (Stardict / Goldendict format)
- Global Lookup hotkey (See Settings > Keybindings)
- The S D L buttons select searching in Suttas / Dictionary / Library
- The cog icon opens advanced options
  - include/exclude commentaries
  - filter the results by nikaya, etc.
  - dictionaries: the lock icon toggles 'search only in this'
- Includes CST suttas and commentaries
  - Direct sutta mapping is work-in-progress, DN, MN, most SN works, should directly open the commentary
  - For others: in the sutta top right Menu > Open Commentary will search for the sutta title to locate the CST file
- Chanting Practice window
  - Record chanting audio and playback for helping memorization
- Bookmarks tab
- Tab List menu
  - The icon at the right end of sutta tabs
  - or the back button on mobile

(Continue at the Github Releases page)
releases.title: v0.4.2

releases.description:
See the **asset downloads** section for Linux, MacOS, Windows and Android. **iOS (iPhone and iPad):** [Let me know](https://gambhiro.github.io/) if you have a developer account and are interested in helping to build `.ipa` files for Simsapa.

New features and fixes:

- Topic Index Window
  + Using data from [index.readingfaithfully.org](https://index.readingfaithfully.org/)
- Improved reference search data
  + Using data from [Dhamma Vinaya Catalogue](https://github.com/dhammavinaya-tools/dhamma-vinaya-catalogue)
- EPUB chapter navigation improvements
- Footnotes in bottom bar
- Title and Headword search mode
- Plugin API
  + For the [Firefox, Chrome, Obsidian and Joplin](https://github.com/simsapa/simsapa-extensions-and-plugins) plugins
- Dictionary examples sutta links open in the app
- Settings Window
  + Shortcuts config for desktop
- (Android) Fixed app crash for pinned tab state
releases.title: v0.1.10

releases.description:
- Reference Converter window
- Reading mode button (hides search input UI)
- New version update notifications
- Fix storage selection dialog empty labels
- (Android) Fix scroll to chapter subheading anchor
